blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,425 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
